notes: Restore points now show net worth and the most recent change (what and when) under each entry, not just the profile count — enough to tell snapshots apart at a glance.

Sync Slot ID loss protection: every ID this device connects to is now kept in a small permanent recovery list (separate from the 15-slot restore ring, never cleared by editing, clearing, or creating a new slot). If the ID is ever lost or wrongly replaced, the Cloud panel offers it back with one tap instead of forcing a brand-new empty slot. Clearing the ID by leaving the field blank now asks for confirmation first, the same as changing it to a different one.
